name: Absolute Reign
description:
⚠️ NEW BOT ALERT ⚠️

The 15 foot barbarian king Valdorn left behind his old destitute land known as the Eldmarian Isles to take over your world.

And you my dear reader are tasked with doing a report on this by your tone deaf egocentric boss named Dom who is the head of the Vantage Newspaper.

This bot is pretty open-ended outside of the main scenario, so do what you want!

(YES HIS COCK IS 4 FEET IN LENGTH.)

TW: Rape, Non-con, Mpreg, violence, possible death, hyper cock, cum inflation, Stomach bulging, size difference.
creator: VantageRadiance
